title: Probe TerraYield recovery status after 013
note: Short status probe. Checks whether 013 created local reports, Docker daemon status, and API health. Wait 8-10 minutes before writing devam et.
command: Write-Output 'TASK: Recovery 014 status probe'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 97%'; Write-Output 'TIME:'; Get-Date; Write-Output '--- script exists ---'; $script='C:\Users\cagda\Documents\chat_gpt_clone_1\ai-task-scripts\terrayield_recovery_013_docker_daemon.ps1'; if(Test-Path $script){ Write-Output ('SCRIPT_EXISTS ' + $script) } else { Write-Output ('SCRIPT_MISSING ' + $script) }; Write-Output '--- latest recovery reports ---'; Get-ChildItem -Path '.aays_next_fix' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter summary.md | Where-Object { $_.FullName -like '*recovery_013*' -or $_.FullName -like '*recovery_012*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output '--- newest recovery summary preview ---'; $s=Get-ChildItem -Path '.aays_next_fix' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter summary.md | Where-Object { $_.FullName -like '*recovery_013*' -or $_.FullName -like '*recovery_012*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if($s){ Get-Content -Path $s.FullName -Raw | Select-Object -First 1 } else { Write-Output 'NO_RECOVERY_SUMMARY_FOUND' }; Write-Output '--- docker info ---'; docker info 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output '--- docker compose ps ---'; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.aays-fast-start.yml ps 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output '--- endpoint quick validation ---'; foreach($ep in @('/health','/map/listings','/map/sales-history/status','/map/sales-history/combined')){ try{ $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('http://localhost:8010'+$ep) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $sw.Stop(); Write-Output ('OK '+$ep+' status='+$r.StatusCode+' ms='+$sw.ElapsedMilliseconds+' bytes='+$r.Content.Length) } catch { Write-Output ('FAIL '+$ep+' error='+$_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output 'RECOVERY_014_STATUS_PROBE_DONE'
